name: teach
description: Record a desktop workflow through native embedded controls on Linux, macOS, or Windows, analyze it with GPT-5.6, and publish a reusable Codex skill.

interface.shortDescription: Turn desktop demonstrations into Codex skills
interface.longDescription: Teach records an explicitly authorized workflow on Linux, macOS, or Windows, uses GPT-5.6 to create a richly labeled and reviewable process, assesses whether Codex can replay it, and publishes the reviewed result as a portable skill.
defaultPrompt: Teach Codex a workflow by recording me
Review and publish my latest taught process
List the workflows I taught Codex
